issues.title: Enemy damage spike on floor 9 encounter 2
issues.description: Enemy dealt 70 damage in a single enemy turn when player had 82 HP (85.4% of current HP)
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing enemy damage scaling or adding damage caps for single hits

issues.title: 8 consecutive easy encounters (floors 1-3)
issues.description: Player maintained >90 HP across 8 consecutive encounters from floor 1 enc 0 to floor 3 enc 1. HP values: [100, 95, 100, 96, 100, 94, 100, 95]
reproductionSteps: Observe lack of challenge — player never drops below 90 HP
issues.suggestedFix: Increase enemy damage or HP in early/mid floors to create more tension

issues.title: Player defeated despite 88.2% accuracy
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 12 with 88.2% overall accuracy (411 correct, 55 wrong). High accuracy should yield better survivability.
reproductionSteps: Play through full run with high accuracy
Observe that good play still results in defeat
issues.suggestedFix: Increase healing from correct answers or reduce enemy damage scaling in later floors

issues.title: Difficulty spike on floor 2 encounter 2 (ember_drake)
issues.description: Encounter took 6 turns to resolve, but the previous floor (1) averaged 2.3 turns. This is a 2.6x spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Review ember_drake stats — HP or damage may be disproportionately high for floor 2
